core_mission.stated: Build trust. Unlock growth. Get compliant, mitigate risk, and build trust with customers using automation backed by world-class experts.

module_a_company_dna.problem_space: Secureframe solves security compliance automation for B2B SaaS companies. The core pain point is the manual, time-intensive process of achieving and maintaining compliance certifications (SOC 2, ISO 27001, etc.) and managing security audits. The platform automates evidence collection, audit preparation, and compliance tracking.
